title: Ripple, JPMorgan and others use XRP Ledger to settle tokenized Treasurys fund internationally
message_html: Ripple, JPMorgan and others use XRP Ledger to settle tokenized Treasurys fund internationally ...
snippet: The transaction represents an example of crypto firms and Wall Street institutions jointly exploring 24/7 settlement systems.

title: SIX gets approval to merge SDX DLT CSD into securities services, adds crypto custody
message_html: SIX gets approval to merge SDX DLT CSD into securities services, adds crypto custody ...
snippet: SIX has received approval from Swiss regulator FINMA to merge its blockchain entity SIX Digital Exchange AG (SDX) into its central securities depository SIX SIS AG. SDX previously operated as a separate licensed entity with its own CSD license for digital assets. Separately, FINMA also approved the
